svg.title: DealMind AI — three-column architecture
svg.desc: Structural diagram showing Frontend (Streamlit), Backend (FastAPI pipeline), and Data Layer (CSV files + Hindsight memory) columns inside a single DealMind AI container.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the client selector work in DealMind AI?')

sendPrompt('What does the deal intelligence engine do?')
sendPrompt('Why does DealMind use qwen3-32b on Groq?')
sendPrompt('What happens after the response is generated?')
